description:
Implement `hx-field-label` (T4 Infrastructure) — standardized label for form fields, used by hx-field as a consistent sub-component.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-field-label/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-field-label.ts`, `hx-field-label.styles.ts`, `hx-field-label.stories.ts`, `hx-field-label.test.ts`

**Props:** `for` (string — ID of the associated form control), `required` (boolean — shows required indicator), `optional` (boolean — shows "(optional)" text)

**Slots:** default (label text), `required-indicator` (custom required marker, defaults to `*`)

**CSS Parts:** `base` (the label element), `required-indicator`, `optional-indicator`

**ARIA:** Renders as native `<label for="...">` in shadow root when `for` prop is set, OR as a `<span>` with `id` for aria-labelledby association when form control is in shadow DOM. Study how `hx-field` currently handles labeling to match the approach.

**Tokens:** `--hx-font-label-*` for typography. Required indicator color: `--hx-color-danger`.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (for association, required indicator, optional indicator), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with various form fields, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-field-label — T4 Form Field Label
